sections.heading: Log In from the Atlas CLI
sections.body:
To authenticate with Atlas using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas auth login [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas auth login](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-auth-login).

For step-by-step instructions on logging in using the
Atlas CLI, see
[Connect from the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/stable/connect-atlas-cli).

sections.heading: Log Out from the Atlas CLI
sections.body:
To log out of your Atlas account using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas auth logout [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas auth logout](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-auth-logout).

sections.heading: View Your Authentication Status from the Atlas CLI
sections.body:
To verify and display information about your authentication state using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas auth whoami [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas auth whoami](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-auth-whoami).
